title: Jennie Lee
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
The '''''Jennie Lee''''' was a [[T-65BR X-wing reconnaissance starfighter|Recon-X]] starfighter attached to the [[21st Recon Group|21<sup>st</sup> Reconnaissance Wing]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[New Republic Fifth Fleet|Fifth Fleet]], commanded by [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Rone Taggar]]. The fighter was named after [[Jennie Lee Taggar|Lieutenant Taggar's mother]], who had fought at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]].

Lieutenant Taggar was the commander of the 21<sup>st</sup> Recon Unit, which was sent to scout all the known [[Yevetha]]n worlds shortly after the disastrous defeat of the Fifth Fleet in the [[Battle of Doornik-319]]. The ''Jennie Lee'' was sent to scout [[N'zoth]], the [[Yevetha]]n homeworld. In orbit, it detected multiple [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyers]], [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustships]], the [[Super Star Destroyer/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Destroyer]] [[Intimidator (Executor-class)|''Pride of Yevetha'']], and the shipyards of Black Fifteen. Its scanner readings were relayed by the R2-R unit of the ''Jennie Lee'' directly back to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], where they were reviewed by President [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and multiple high-ranking military commands. It flew a constant trajectory while using braking thruster maneuvers.

However, before it could complete the last thirty seconds of its recon scan, it was hit by ion cannon fire from the [[Yevetha]]n corvette ''[[Beauty of Yevetha]]''. Eighty-nine seconds later, it was reeled in by tractor beam. Rather than being captured, Lieutenant Taggar wiped all the data from the Recon-X's computers, detonated his R2-R unit, and then self-destructed his fighter. The explosion killed him and destroyed both the ''Jennie Lee'' and the ''Beauty of Yevetha''.

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]''
